reasoning: Apple officially released an updated version of the Apple Vision Pro equipped with the M5 processor (an upgrade from the original M2) on October 22, 2025. Although branded in many articles as the "M5 Apple Vision Pro" or "Apple Vision Pro 2", it clearly fits the resolution criteria, which states that an un-numbered successor qualifies if it retains the original functions and expands upon them. The upgrade is substantial enough—analogous to iPhone intergenerational jumps—to qualify as a true successor. Because the product is already available for purchase by the public, well before December 31, 2025, there is very little doubt of a YES resolution.
